title: stelis gracilis
intro: Stelis gracilis, also known as the gracile Stelis, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis gracilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Stelis gracilis are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water to create teas or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
